 {"id":"gt-1elg","title":"Code review: handoff.go changes (gt-yt6g, gt-tocb)","description":"Review ~80 lines of Go changes to internal/cmd/handoff.go:

## Commits to review
- 1414081: Standardize session end with gt handoff (gt-yt6g)
  - Detect polecats via GT_POLECAT env var
  - Call gt done instead of respawning for polecats
  - +31/-11 lines

- 9c85b83: Support full session paths in gt handoff (gt-tocb)
  - resolveRoleToSession accepts <rig>/crew/<name>, <rig>/witness, <rig>/refinery
  - +46/-3 lines

## Review focus
- Error handling in path resolution
- Edge cases in polecat detection
- Test coverage needed?","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T14:27:40.605575-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T14:27:40.605575-08:00"}
